pages.title: Spirit
pages.text: Spirits are glowing creatures that spawn in and fly around the $(l:dimensions/spirit_world)Spirit World$(/l). When hit enough, the become $(l:artifacts/misc/subdued_spirit)Subdued Spirits$(/l) and may be picked up. Placing a Subdued Spirit wakens it again.$(p)Subdued Spirits can be carried back from the Spirit World to the Overworld.

Spirits usually roam around the $(l:dimensions/spirit_world)Spirit World$(/l) and can only spawn there under proper conditions.$(br)Spirits can be attracted, similar to how animals are tempted towards food, to $(l:resources/clay_jars#focused_will)Focused Will$(/l).
